name: Local Viking
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Small Business, Freelancers, SMBs, Large Businesses, Enterprises
description:
What Local Viking Does?

Local Viking empowers businesses to enhance their local online presence by offering advanced tools for precise location-based monitoring, comprehensive device visibility tracking, historical performance analysis, and efficient reporting and manual spot-checking capabilities.

Source: Local Viking

‍

Features:

➡️ Center searches around specific lat/long coordinates to accurately monitor business rankings in different geographic areas.

➡️ Track rankings across both mobile and desktop platforms to ensure comprehensive visibility across devices.

➡️ Access historical performance data of Google Business Profiles (GBPs) to analyze trends and evaluate the effectiveness of local SEO strategies over time.

➡️ Generate interactive reports and receive alerts to stay informed about significant changes in rankings, facilitating proactive SEO management.

➡️ Access direct links within the dashboard for quick and convenient manual inspection of local search results as needed.

➡️ Visualize and analyze business rankings across multiple coordinates, providing insights into geographic ranking variations and trends.

Benefits:

⭐️ Target specific geographic locations with precise lat/long coordinates, optimizing local SEO strategies effectively.

⭐️ Monitor and compare rankings on both mobile and desktop platforms to ensure consistent online visibility across all user devices.

⭐️ Utilize historical ranking data to identify patterns, measure SEO campaign success, and make data-driven decisions for continuous improvement.

⭐️ Receive timely alerts and detailed reports to promptly address ranking changes and maintain competitive edge in local search results.

⭐️ Quickly verify local search results through direct dashboard links, streamlining troubleshooting and optimization tasks.

Pros:

✅ Offers a geo area map which serves as a great tool

Cons:

❌ It is based on a credit pricing system which can get confusing and is difficult to understand for a lot of users

‍

Priced at $39 Per Month
